name: brainstorm
description: Multi-model brainstorming via deliberation loops — 4-step flow (Diverge / Steer / Interrogate / Synthesize) using Claude, Codex, and Gemini with 3 hardcoded personas (Explorer, Operator, Contrarian), Socratic questioning, human steering checkpoint, and deterministic convergence detection. Flags: --quick (skip steering), --bias novelty|balanced|practical (preset), --providers (restrict subset).
